_wiring_notes.DataSovereigntyRegistry: Phase 69 â€” Immutable data sovereignty pledge. Three-tier licensing (MANUFACTURER/DEVELOPER/GAMER). Call pledge_() once after deploy. operator=0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692.
_wiring_notes.HumanityOracle: Phase 69 â€” Native VAPI oracle. DataCuratorAgent writes after each PITL cycle. humanityPct scaled Ã—10 (1000 = 100.0%). Any tournament contract may query.
_wiring_notes.RulingOracle: Phase 69 â€” Native VAPI oracle. Wraps RulingEnforcementAgent streak state. isEligible() = not suspended AND flagStreak < 5 AND holdStreak < 2.
_wiring_notes.PassportOracle: Phase 69 â€” Native VAPI oracle. Wraps PITLTournamentPassport on-chain status. hasVerifiedPassport() = issued AND onChain.
_wiring_notes.VAPIRewardDistributor: Phase 69 â€” DePIN token distributor. Device-gated (not player-gated, separation ratio 0.362). Multipliers stack: passport 1.5Ã— + enrollment 2.0Ã— + streak 2.5Ã— + MPC 1.25Ã— + gate 3.0Ã—. setRewardToken() before first claim.
_wiring_notes.VAPIDataMarketplace: Phase 69 â€” Three-tier data exchange. MANUFACTURER/DEVELOPER/GAMER only. Data pricing in VAPI reward points. 70% device pool / 30% treasury revenue split. sovereigntyRegistry wired.
_wiring_notes.VAPIGovernanceTimelock: Phase 70 â€” 48h governance timelock for Phase 69 contracts. coSigner=deployer (update via setCoSigner). operator=0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692.
_wiring_notes.VAPIProtocolLens: Phase 70 â€” Zero-state unified device state view. Synthesizes 4 Phase 69 oracles in one eth_call. isFullyEligible(deviceId) -> bool.

_vapiprotocollens_v2_note: Path A Arc 1 Commit 4 â€” adds isFullyEligible_PathA(bytes32) + getDeviceTier(bytes32) on top of v1's isFullyEligible (byte-for-byte preserved). Constructor 5th arg = VAPIManufacturerDeviceRegistry. Replace-posture matches SeparationRatioRegistry redeploy (2026-05-24): v1 stays callable at 0x1972bf75... (preserved as VAPIProtocolLens_v1_superseded below); bridge env PROTOCOL_LENS_ADDRESS updated to point at v2. Tournament integrators hard-coded against v1 continue to work because EVM bytecode is immutable. Deployed 2026-05-27 chainId 4690. tx 0x13acf23af14faa413b064b122272c409c12bc01f5bb7bb0faf5431a272262c69, block 44028226, gasUsed 605750, status 1, cost 0.605750 IOTX (wallet 9.918614 -> 9.312864). All 5 oracle/registry addresses byte-equal on-chain post-deploy (humanityOracle / rulingOracle / passportOracle / rewardDistributor / manufacturerDeviceRegistry). Live smoke isFullyEligible(0x00...00)=false / isFullyEligible_PathA(0x00...00)=false / getDeviceTier(0x00...00)=0 â€” honest dormant defaults for zero deviceId. eth_getCode-verified, 3068 hex bytecode. Function surface pinned by INV-LENS-V2-001.
_vapiprotocollens_v1_superseded_note: Phase 70 original lens (LIVE 2026-03-19; 4-oracle composition, isFullyEligible only). SUPERSEDED 2026-05-27 by VAPIProtocolLens_v2 at 0x32Bf1A01... which adds Path A composability via VAPIManufacturerDeviceRegistry. v1 remains callable at this address â€” EVM bytecode is immutable. Tournament integrators that hard-coded v1 see no behavior change. New integrators bind v2 to gain isFullyEligible_PathA + getDeviceTier.

_phase222_note: Phase 222: BBG â€” governance proposals gated on live VHP; blocks STOLEN_KEY+VHP_EXPIRY+FLASH_LOAN attacks. ABI NOTE 2026-05-28: BBG's IVHP222 interface declares expiresAt(uint256), but the canonical VAPIVerifiedHumanProof (Phase 99C) exposes expiresAt only as field 5 of the vhpData(uint256) struct getter. Bridged by VHPExpiresAtAdapter (Curator governance unblock arc 2026-05-28); Phase 2b 2026-05-28 fired BBG.setVHPContract(0x086a660fe457633063299F3BE9661B86c43aF053) via tx 0x090af4f45878d766788a02cad405ff731ca80b36c7934a0d51f8f65a2be51e03 block 44073466 gasUsed 22574 status 1 cost 0.022574 IOTX. BBG.vhpContract() now resolves expiresAt(uint256) through the adapter -> proposeWithVHP() unblocked. FIRST PROPOSAL 2026-05-28: Curator scope-expansion governance commitment landed via tx 0xba96f7cbddaab7e5e5f524ee123455e01e4f5137e42cd1efa12ed1be3e8ef9de block 44073691 gasUsed 226259 status 1 cost 0.226259 IOTX. proposalHash 0x59fb999622e97325f5598a03ee6640e36064d3b781f4ac8d06b2538a7f3a9442 = SHA-256(b'VAPI-CURATOR-SCOPE-PROPOSAL-v1' || agentId 0xed6a2df58e5ec... || newScopeHash 0xab874f62970... || justificationHash 0x4bac37c0433...). totalProposals 0 -> 1. BBG._proposed[proposalHash] = true. Re-derive: scripts/compute_governance_hashes.py against docs/governance/. Full audit trail: docs/governance/SUBMISSION_RECEIPT.md.
_vhpexpiresatadapter_note: Curator governance ceremony unblock arc 2026-05-28 Phase 2a â€” IVHP222 shim over VAPIVerifiedHumanProof (0xD3B2E259...). Immutable wrapper exposing expiresAt(uint256), isValid(uint256), ownerOf(uint256) â€” the three methods VAPIBiometricGovernance.proposeWithVHP() requires. The wrapped VHP's vhpData(uint256) auto-getter returns a 7-tuple with expiresAt at field 5; this adapter delegates that read. Deployed 2026-05-28 chainId 4690. tx 0x749b3cc1765759cdbc6296b585b16a0201a025a2642a49ae9c78cd31aa05bd72, block 44073254, gasUsed 298312, status 1, cost 0.298312 IOTX (wallet 9.120491 -> 8.822179). Bytecode 1744 hex bytes. Post-deploy smoke (against bridge wallet's Phase 99 VHP tokenId=2): vhp() = 0xD3B2E259..., ownerOf(2) = bridge wallet, isValid(2) = true, expiresAt(2) = 1786149975 (epoch s, ~Sept 2026). Phase 2b operator-fires BBG.setVHPContract(this address) via scripts/set_bbg_vhp_contract.py + BBG_SET_VHP_CONFIRM=1 env-gate. Phase 3 then re-fires scripts/fire_curator_governance_proposal.py + CURATOR_GOVERNANCE_CONFIRM=1.

_vapimanufacturerdeviceregistry_note: Path A Arc 1 Commit 2 â€” manufacturer-authoritative device birth certificate registry (Ownable + ReentrancyGuard, onlyOwner writes). DELIBERATE TRUST-MODEL DIVERGENCE from VAPIPoEPRegistry (gamer-sovereign): MFG registry attests device-as-shipped hardware identity (manufacturer/foundation HSM wallet); PoEP registry stores gamer-self-registered composite renewal keys. Both registries coexist; VAPIProtocolLens_v2 (Commit 4) will compose both for isFullyEligible_PathA(). FROZEN enum constants (pinned by INV-MFG-001 / INV-MFG-002): signingPath {1=A silicon, 2=B host-JSON}; proofTier {1=FULL DualSense Edge CFI-ZCP1, 2=STANDARD DualSense CFI-ZCT1, 3=BASIC third-party}. Path A v1 scope = silicon-rooted iPACT renewal authenticity only; per-PoAC record silicon-root reserved for Path A v2 (Arc 3+). Deployed 2026-05-26 chainId 4690. tx 0x07efc58a0b5b34fa3805d30aa45538c137d8059cc0c4b800c052703cacbb66a9, block 44019764, gasUsed 867045, status 1, owner=bridge wallet 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692 (eth_getCode-verified, 5236 hex). Cost 0.867045 IOTX (wallet 10.785659 -> 9.918614). All 5 FROZEN enum constants byte-equal on-chain post-deploy. Live view smoke test on unregistered device returns (0,0,false,false) dormant defaults as expected. Set MANUFACTURER_DEVICE_REGISTRY_ADDRESS in bridge env to activate chain.get_device_signing_path / get_proof_tier / is_path_a / is_active_in_mfg_registry fail-open->live transition.
_vapibuyerregistry_note: Data Economy Arc 1 Commit 1 â€” Curator-attested buyer credential registry (Ownable + ReentrancyGuard). Curator (vapi-curator agentId 0xed6a2df5...) attests a buyer's category after off-chain documentation review; credentials expire after 365 days. Trust model CURATOR-ATTESTED, structurally parallel to VAPIManufacturerDeviceRegistry. Governance authority: Curator scope-expansion proposalHash 0x59fb999622e97325f5598a03ee6640e36064d3b781f4ac8d06b2538a7f3a9442 (BBG tx 0xba96f7cb..., block 44073691) + Phase 4a/4b scope-update fires (scope byte-aligned at 0xab874f62...). FROZEN-v1 category enum (PV-CI INV-BUY-001/002 to be pinned in the bridge-wiring commit): CATEGORY_ACADEMIC=1, CATEGORY_GAME_DEV=2, CATEGORY_ESPORTS=3, CATEGORY_BRAND=4 (category 5+ reserved, extend strictly upward). ABI built to the framework-doc spec (bytes32 buyerDID identifier / 4 categories / isValidCredential) â€” operator-ratified 2026-05-28; supersedes the state-doc Â§5.2 draft spec (address buyerAddr / 3 categories / isAuthorizedBuyer), which is being reconciled to match. Deployed 2026-05-28 chainId 4690. tx 0xd4346f0bd5dbe8ada42c6c76c51691a438f6464c0b35b1d0a56002a0e642d525, block 44080863, gasUsed 864345, status 1, owner=bridge wallet 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692. Cost 0.864345 IOTX (wallet 7.649201 -> ~6.785). Post-deploy view smoke: owner==deployer, CATEGORY_ACADEMIC=1, CATEGORY_BRAND=4. setCuratorWallet FIRED 2026-05-28 (tx 0xaf1209fb1f1526c219a0a98d682ba70ff910b7c4b5a59f5951d2b1426538b057, block 44080937, gasUsed 39691, status 1, cost 0.039691 IOTX) â€” curatorWallet now == bridge wallet 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692 (v1: Curator submits via bridge wallet, two-key gate preserved); registry is now authorized for issueCredential/revokeCredential. Wallet 7.649201 -> ~6.745 across deploy (0.864345) + setCuratorWallet (0.039691). Next: bridge chain methods + INV-BUY-001 (Commit 2) + curator_attestation.py + POST /curator/attest-buyer (Commit 3).
